hero.desc: Marme Villa Jogja is more than just a place to stay. It is designed to create warm, precious moments with family and loved ones.
about.title: Where Comfort Meets Timeless Mediterranean Charm
about.p1: Marme Villa Jogja features an elegant Mediterranean design. Arches, terracotta jars, natural stones, and tropical plants will make you feel like you are in a true Tropical Mediterranean labyrinth.
about.p2: This villa offers a relaxing rural atmosphere far from the hustle of the city. Spacious rooms, beautiful views, and complete facilities provide a comfortable stay. With a blend of modern comfort and Mediterranean charm, every visit here will feel special and full of warmth.
about.val1.d: Warm service from all Marme Villa Management staff.
about.val2.d: Responsibility for any mistakes that may occur.
about.val3.d: Rural location with breathtaking natural beauty.
rooms.title: Types & Units of Marme Villa Management
exp.title: The best additional services for our guests

location.title: Among the rice fields and lush countryside of Yogyakarta
location.desc: Hidden in the rural area of Bantul, Yogyakarta. Marme Villa has a strategic and beautiful location.

booking.success.steps.2.title: Prepare Your Visit
booking.success.steps.2.desc: Pack light, don't forget your camera, and get ready for an unforgettable Javanese cultural experience.
booking.success.steps.3.title: Arrive & Relax
booking.success.steps.3.desc: Our team will welcome you with traditional Javanese greetings and a welcoming ritual.

booking.status.help.desc: Contact us at our admin emergency number for any travel issues or order adjustments.
availability.meta_desc: Find room availability directly at our three heritage pavilions.
availability.title: Check Availability
availability.desc: Choose your dates and number of guests. We will show room availability and the best rates for our three heritage pavilions.
availability.note: Rates include daily breakfast, welcoming ritual, and afternoon tea. Government tax & service of 11% will be applied at payment.
availability.minbook_toast_desc: Check-in and check-out dates cannot be the same.
